headline: Xfinity High-Speed Internet Now Available in Ona, West Virginia
summary: ONA, W.Va., March 25, 2026--The first residents in Ona, West Virginia, are now connected to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from Xfinity. This is a key milestone in the network expansion project that will connect more than 2,300 homes and businesses in Ona to America’s smartest and most reliable converged WiFi network.

headline: Watching reality TV really can change your behavior, sociologist says: 'Whether good or bad,' you'll learn from it
summary: Watching reality TV could influence your life and how you interact with people more than you expect, says Lehigh University sociologist Danielle J. Lindemann.

headline: Legal AI startup Harvey valued at $11 billion in funding round, as VCs spread bets beyond model companies
summary: Harvey will use its fresh capital to expand its AI agents and grow its embedded legal engineering teams.
